subject: Update helm charts to use common templates
commit_message:
Update helm charts to use common templates

Following charts have been converted to use
the common templatess:

aai
aai-babel
aai-champ
aai-data-router
aai-gizmo
aai-modelloader
aai-resources
aai-schema-service
aai-search-data
aai-sparky-be
aai-spike
aai-traversal
aai-graphadmin

Issue-ID: OOM-1972
Change-Id: I0450394bbb7035c24bf5f60d7defc6b6d2572f3e
Signed-off-by: Kajur, Harish (vk250x) <vk250x@att.com>
